heading: Use of electric and hybrid vehicles by Federal agencies
label: 2510 Use of electric and hybrid vehicles by Federal agencies
notes: Transfer of Functions“Secretary of Energy” substituted in text for “Administrator” pursuant to , see Codification note set out under .section 301(a) of Pub. L. 95–91section 2502 of this title

children.text: carry out a study of the practicability of using electric and hybrid vehicles in the performance of some or all of the functions of their agencies; and
arrange for the introduction of electric and hybrid vehicles into their fleets as soon as possible.
